ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary genre of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Short description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the album */,
  "number_of_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings received by the album */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews written for the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the album */,
  "album_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the album */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being rated */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_albums" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album included in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being tracked */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist being tracked */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the album or artist */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Total number of streams for the album or artist */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Total number of downloads for the album or artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
